impact: The daemon has been retrying the same public PDF extraction task after syntax and validation failures. This repair gives the next worker deterministic recovery guidance: avoid broad contract rewrites, avoid embedding forbidden search tokens in negative field names, and retry with the smallest fixture/test set aligned to the validator's actual assertions.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor recovery rule for forbidden-token fixture failures during public PDF extraction retries.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
